steps.title: Support the juxtaposition claim
steps.content: The underlined claim says Primeval and Other Times resembles magical realist novels by combining literary realism with Polish folklore. The supporting quotation therefore needs both the realistic or antirealistic modes and the presence of Polish folklore.

steps.title: Reject incomplete quotations
steps.content: Choice A mentions folklore and magical realism but not the novel's realistic mode. Choice C shifts toward Latin American influence rather than directly supporting the underlined comparison. Choice D describes disruption by folklore but not the fuller juxtaposition of modes. The answer is B.
